## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Dependency/security update

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` (when behavior changed)

## Breaking changes

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes (describe below)

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] Changelog updated
- [ ] Ops/security/testing docs updated (if needed)

## Notes for reviewers

Add context, tradeoffs, and areas that need careful review.
